== Notes for [[Item:Q56510|Q56510]] ==

"'''México, Distrito Federal, registros parroquiales y diocesanos, 1514-1970'''", database with images, FamilySearch (https://familysearch.org/ark:/61903/1:1:QJ8B-M9B5 : 28 July 2015), Lope de Sosa in entry for Francisco de Sosa Cabrera, 1585. ... Name: '''Francisco de Sosa Cabrera'''; Event Type: '''Baptism'''; Event Date: '''26 Apr 1585'''; Event Place: '''Asunción Sagrario Metropolitano, Centro, Distrito Federal, Mexico'''; Gender: Male; Father's Name: Lope de Sosa; Mother's Name: Ynes Cabrera de Castillo

See a '''photograph of Francisco's original Baptism Record''' in his profile's "Media/Documents" section.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051ADA72DD01EFBBFA9822EF79916C731E
geni:6000000012546385996

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
